scripts.dev: concurrently --parallel --names "infra,event,analytics,worker,gateway,frontend" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "yellow,blue,cyan,green,magenta,white" --hide "infra" "npm run dev:infra" "npm run dev:event" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:debug: concurrently --parallel --names "event,analytics,worker,gateway" "npm run dev:event" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.mongo: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml exec mongodb mongosh
scripts.redis: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml exec redis redis-cli
scripts.redis:flush: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml exec redis redis-cli FLUSHALL
